hero.title: Sales Admin Automation Toolkit
hero.subtitle: Practical Excel-based sales operations workflows automated with Python and a web dashboard — order validation, inventory allocation, and payment aging, built to demonstrate end-to-end process thinking.

workflows.title: Order Validation
workflows.description: Checks incoming orders against business rules — missing fields, invalid SKUs, quantity limits — before they reach fulfilment.

workflows.title: Inventory Allocation
workflows.description: Allocates available stock to open orders by priority tier, delivery date, SKU demand, and warehouse location.

workflows.title: Payment Aging
workflows.description: Calculates days outstanding on open invoices and surfaces follow-up priority for the accounts team.

workflows.title: Excel Report Export
workflows.description: Generates formatted workbooks — order summaries, aging reports, allocation logs — from each workflow's results.

businessValues.heading: Catch order-entry issues earlier
businessValues.body: Validation runs before orders are passed to fulfilment, aiming to reduce rework caused by missing or incorrect data.

businessValues.heading: Apply consistent allocation rules
businessValues.body: Priority, delivery window, SKU demand, and warehouse capacity are applied through defined, testable rules rather than ad hoc judgement.

businessValues.heading: Track overdue payments by priority
businessValues.body: A payment aging view shows outstanding invoices by days overdue, so follow-up can be prioritized by risk.

businessValues.heading: Export reports in a familiar format
businessValues.body: Formatted Excel workbooks match the structure operations teams already work with.

boundaryPoints: All data in this demo is fictional and generated for portfolio purposes only.
This is not a full ERP, WMS, CRM, or accounting system — it demonstrates specific workflow automation patterns.
Figures, SKUs, customer names, and invoice references are placeholders.
